summary: Backend: 11/11 pytest passed (auth, materials/text with LLM, quiz submit, flashcard SM-2 review, study-plan create/toggle, stats, billing mock upgrade/downgrade, upload limit guard). Frontend: landing, login (demo@studyos.app/demo1234), dashboard, library, piano studio, statistiche, pricing all load successfully. Token persisted in localStorage as 'studyos_token'. Study plan day toggle works (Completati 1/10). Stats chart renders with 60% avg score.

ui_bugs.issue: Main content area appears mostly empty on first render (sidebar visible, content column blank in screenshot). May be a loading-state issue or stats cards not rendering when materials list is short.

issues: Console warning: chart width(-1) height(-1) — ResponsiveContainer parent lacks explicit min-width/min-height in some condition
<title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of StudyOS branding; favicon/meta not updated
Two identical TEST_Plan cards rendered (duplicate plans from repeated test runs — not a bug, just seed artifact)

action_items: Dashboard page: verify main content renders stats tiles + recent materials even for free/empty-state users (screenshot shows blank right pane).
Update document <title> and meta from default 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'StudyOS'.
Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height=-1 warning on Stats page (set min-height on parent).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 769 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth/materials/plans/stats/billing) for maintainability.
check_upload_limit date range uses string comparison on ISO timestamps with '+00:00' suffix — works but prefer proper $gte datetime objects.
/api/auth/session sets cookie but frontend uses Bearer JWT in localStorage — inconsistent auth strategies can confuse debugging.
_id is properly excluded on reads via projection; insert responses correctly pop('_id'). Good.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/login — susceptible to brute force.
JWT_SECRET defaults to 'dev-secret' if env missing — should fail fast on startup.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Fotosintesi material; created TEST_Plan study plans (not cleaned up — visible in Piano Studio).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. /api/materials/text takes ~30-40s due to Claude LLM. For frontend retests, login via POST /api/auth/login then set localStorage.studyos_token before navigating to protected routes to skip UI login. Duplicate TEST_Plan entries exist in demo user's study_plans collection — main agent may want a cleanup script.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues found. Dashboard blank-pane finding needs visual inspection by main agent.
